# Test Fixtures

Place real test images here for the IDM-VTON integration test.

## Required files

- `person.jpg` - A full-body photo of a person (768x1024 or larger)
- `garment.jpg` - A garment product photo (768x1024 or larger, on white background)

## Where to get test images

Use the IDM-VTON repo test images:
    git clone https://github.com/yisol/IDM-VTON.git /tmp/idm-vton
    cp /tmp/idm-vton/test/image tests/fixtures/person.jpg
    cp /tmp/idm-vton/test/garment tests/fixtures/garment.jpg

Or use any full-body person photo + any garment product photo.
